TaxPortal

Comprehensive tax information and calculators for countries worldwide

Explore Countries

Featured Countries

United States

North America

The United States has a progressive federal income tax system with additional state and local taxes. Tax residents are taxed on worldwide income, while non-residents are taxed only on US-source income.

Explore taxes →

India

Asia

India has a comprehensive tax system with direct and indirect taxes. The Income Tax Act governs direct taxes while GST unifies indirect taxation.

Explore taxes →

Hong Kong

Asia

Hong Kong operates a territorial tax system with low tax rates. Only profits sourced in Hong Kong are subject to profits tax.

Explore taxes →

Singapore

Asia

Singapore has a low-tax regime with resident tax rates from 0% to 24%. The country operates a territorial tax system with various tax incentives.

Explore taxes →

Indonesia

Asia

Indonesia has a progressive individual income tax system and corporate tax at 22%. The country uses a self-assessment system.

Explore taxes →

Malaysia

Asia

Malaysia has a progressive income tax system with rates from 0% to 30%. The country also imposes SST (Sales and Service Tax).

Explore taxes →

About Our Tax Calculator Tools

Welcome to TaxPortal, your comprehensive source for a free online tax calculator and tax estimator suite designed to simplify tax planning and estimation for individuals and businesses worldwide. Whether you need a basic income tax calculator, an advanced payroll calculator, or a specialized tool such as a capital gains tax calculator, VAT calculator, GST calculator, or stamp duty calculator, our platform provides accurate, up-to-date calculations based on official tax brackets, withholding tables, and statutory rates.

Our tax estimator tools cover a wide range of use cases across multiple countries and tax years. Use our federal tax calculator to estimate your federal income tax liability under the latest IRS tax brackets, or try our state tax calculator for California, New York, Georgia, and other state-level obligations. If you are self-employed, our self employment tax calculator with deductions makes it easy to account for SE tax, home office deductions, and business expenses. Our 1099 tax calculator, 1099 NEC tax calculator, and independent contractor taxes calculator help gig workers and freelancers set aside the right amount for quarterly tax calculator payments and estimated tax payments.

Employees can rely on our paycheck calculator, paystub calculator, and payroll calculator to see their gross-to-net conversion in detail. Our W-4 calculator and W-4 estimator help you optimize tax withholding to avoid surprises at tax time, while our payroll deductions online calculator and payroll deduction calculator break down every deduction from your paycheck. We also offer hourly-specific tools such as the hourly wage calculator, hourly paycheck calculator, hourly payroll calculator, and weekly tax calculator for workers paid by the hour.

Investors and homeowners benefit from our specialized calculators. Estimate taxes on 401k withdrawals with our taxes on 401k withdrawal calculator, calculate capital gains tax on the sale of property or stock gains, or determine your taxable social security benefits with our dedicated calculator. Property owners can use our property tax calculator, mortgage tax deduction calculator, and rental property depreciation calculator to better understand real estate tax obligations. Our tax refund estimator and tax refund calculator help you predict your refund amount before filing, while our comprehensive tax return calculator guides you through the complete filing process for 1040, 1040EZ, and self assessment returns.

International users benefit from region-specific tools. Our UK tax calculator and HMRC tax calculator handle UK income tax and National Insurance, our Canadian tax calculator and CRA payroll calculator cover Canadian federal and provincial taxes, our Australian tax calculator and ATO tax calculator address Australian obligations, and our Indian tax calculator supports both old and new tax regimes with Excel-compatible outputs. Our GST calculator works for India, Singapore, New Zealand, and other GST-adopting countries, while our VAT calculator and online VAT calculator support the UK, EU, and other VAT-registered jurisdictions.

Planning for retirement? Use our SEP IRA calculator, Solo 401k contribution calculator, Roth IRA conversion calculator, and traditional IRA to Roth IRA conversion tools to minimize tax on retirement savings. Our RRSP calculator, RRSP withdrawal tax calculator, and superannuation calculator are tailored for Canadian and Australian savers. Business owners can rely on our LLC tax calculator, S corp tax calculator, corporation tax calculator, and small business taxes calculator for entity-level planning. We also offer niche tools such as our company car tax calculator, salary sacrifice calculator, nanny tax calculator, Doordash tax calculator, Uber tax calculator, and onlyfans tax calculator for unique income scenarios.

Planning for retirement? Use our SEP IRA calculator, Solo 401k contribution calculator, Roth IRA conversion calculator, and traditional IRA to Roth IRA conversion tools to minimize tax on retirement savings. Our RRSP calculator, RRSP withdrawal tax calculator, and superannuation calculator are tailored for Canadian and Australian savers. Business owners can rely on our LLC tax calculator, S corp tax calculator, corporation tax calculator, and small business taxes calculator for entity-level planning. We also offer niche tools such as our company car tax calculator, salary sacrifice calculator, nanny tax calculator, Doordash tax calculator, Uber tax calculator, and onlyfans tax calculator for unique income scenarios.

At TaxPortal, every tax estimator is built with precision and clarity. Our tax bracket calculator shows exactly which rates apply to your income, our effective tax rate calculator reveals your true tax burden, and our tax deduction calculator helps you maximize allowable deductions. Whether you are filing a 1040, 1040EZ, or a self assessment tax return, our tools provide the insights you need to file confidently. Explore our full suite of calculators today and take control of your tax planning.

Need to know your take-home pay? Our salary after tax tools answer questions like 30k a year is how much a month after taxes, 40k salary after tax, 60k a year is how much a month after taxes, 75k a year is how much a month after taxes, and 80k a year is how much a month after taxes. Whether you want to know 22k after tax, 25k after tax, 30k after tax, 40k after tax, 50k after tax, 60k after tax, 70k after tax, 75k after tax, or 80k after tax, our monthly and biweekly paycheck calculator breaks down your gross to net conversion with precision. Use our net pay calculator or nett pay calculator to see your exact in hand salary after federal, state, and payroll taxes.

International users benefit from region-specific tools across every major tax jurisdiction. Our ATO tax calculator and ATO income tax calculator handle Australian obligations, including superannuation, super contribution, and fortnightly tax table calculations. Our HMRC tax calculator, HMRC income tax calculator, HMRC salary calculator, and HMRC PAYE calculator cover UK Income Tax, National Insurance, and STAMP DUTY including SDLT and LBTT. We also support BIR tax calculator for the Philippines, CRA payroll calculator and CRA deductions calculator for Canada, KRA PAYE calculator for Kenya, LHDN calculator and LHDN PCB calculator for Malaysia, FBR tax calculator for Pakistan, IRD income tax calculator for New Zealand, IRAS calculator for Singapore, and ZRA PAYE calculator for Zambia.

India-specific planning is comprehensive with dedicated tools. Use our 234A interest calculator, 234B interest calculator, and 234C interest calculator to estimate interest on late or deficient advance tax. Our 80GG calculator helps renters claim deductions under Section 80GG, while our HRA calculator handles HRA calculation for income tax, HRA exemption formula, and HRA rebate calculation for both old and new regimes. Our TDS calculator and calculate TDS on salary tool handles TDS on salary for FY 2022-23, TDS late payment interest calculator, and interest on TDS calculator. Use our capital gain calculator for AY 2022-23, capital gain calculator with indexation, and capital gain tax calculator for AY 2022-23 to compute capital gains tax on sale of property, LTGC calculator, and short term capital gains tax with ease.

GST and VAT calculations are fully covered. Use our GST calculator online, rapid GST calculator, GST inclusive calculator, and reverse GST calculator for accurate GST calculation formula in Excel or online. Our add GST calculator and minus GST calculator handle both GST inclusive and GST exclusive transactions, while our GST interest calculator, GST late fee calculator, and GSTR 3B late fee calculator help with compliance. We also offer HST tax calculator, HST reverse calculator, VAT calculator SA, minus VAT calculator, and reverse VAT calculator for VAT-registered businesses.

Other essential financial tools include our estate tax computation and inheritence tax calculator, average property tax lookup, land transfer tax calculator, mortgage tax calculator, and property depreciation calculator for real estate investors. Employers can use our employer payroll taxes calculator, employer NI calculator 2022-23, and ESI employer contribution tools to estimate business costs. Our AGI calculator and modified AGI calculator help determine adjusted gross income for federal returns, while our effective tax rate formula and average tax rate formula tools explain your true tax burden. From gross and net salary comparisons to net to gross salary calculator conversions, TaxPortal is the complete online resource for everything related to taxes, salaries, and take-home pay.

Wondering what your salary is worth after taxes? Our hourly income calculator answers questions like $15 an hour is how much a year after taxes, $18 an hour is how much a month after taxes, and $30 an hour is how much a year after taxes. For annual salaries, see what $50000 a year is how much a month after taxes, $60000 a year is how much a month after taxes, $70000 a year is how much a month after taxes, or $80000 a year is how much a month after taxes really means for your wallet. High earners can use our 100k after tax and 100k salary after taxes tools, while business owners rely on our pre tax income calculator and pre tax calculator to plan compensation packages with car allowance tax calculator, company car tax calculator, and bik car tax calculator insights.

Property transactions and homeownership come with extra tax obligations. Use our stamp duty calculator 2022 and current stamp duty rates lookup for residential purchases, or try our stamp duty on second home and stamp duty on second property calculators for additional property investments. Estimate stamp duty on 400k house, stamp duty on 500k house, or any amount with our stamp duty cost estimator. We also offer land transfer tax calculator, property transfer tax calculator, mortgage stamp duty calculator, and commercial property tax calculator for real estate professionals. Landlords benefit from our landlord tax calculator, rental tax calculator, and tax on sale of rental property calculator tools.

Investors need specialized calculators too. Our day trading tax calculator and stock loss tax calculator help active traders estimate obligations, while our mutual fund tax calculator and savings tax calculator cover passive investment income. Calculate capital gains tax on real estate with our capital gains tax calculator on sale of property, or use our depreciation recapture calculator for property sales. Our windfall tax tool and lotto tax calculator help you understand taxes on sudden gains, while our lump sum tax calculator and lump sum payment tax calculator cover retirement distributions and settlements.

Business and payroll compliance is made simple with our total tax calculator, tax liability calculator, and taxes owed calculator. Small business owners can estimate company tax calculator, corporate dividend tax, and employer payroll taxes calculator with ease. Use our payroll remittance calculator, payroll deductions, and paycheck deductions tools to stay compliant. Our commission tax calculator, overtime tax calculator, and bonus tax calculator 2022 handle variable compensation, while our payslip calculator, paystub calculator, and paycheckcity salary calculator generate detailed pay breakdowns.

Retirement savers can plan with confidence using our pension income tax calculator, pension tax calculator by state, and tax relief on pension contributions calculator. Our provident fund tax calculator and cpf contribution calculator cover Singapore and Malaysia retirement schemes, while our RRSP calculator and RRSP withdrawal tax calculator serve Canadian savers. Use our nps tax benefit calculator for Indian NPS contributions, or our salary sacrifice calculator hmrc and ato salary sacrifice calculator for UK and Australia salary packaging.

Our income tax formula and tax computation tools help users understand how taxes are calculated. Use our taxable income formula and tax computation worksheet to prepare for filing, or try our tax return estimator 2021 and 2021 to 2022 tax calculator for prior-year planning. Taxpayers can estimate estimated federal tax payments with our pay estimated taxes tool, check irs withholding tables 2022 calculator, or use our irs withholding estimator to avoid underpayment penalties. Our irs late payment penalty calculator and irs penalty calculator help you understand compliance costs.

Additional regional tools include our ATO tax return calculator for Australian annual returns, ATO tax tables fortnightly and ATO tax calculator weekly for pay periods, ATO fuel tax calculator and fuel tax credit calculator for business vehicles, and ATO depreciation calculator for asset write-offs. Canadians rely on our CRA income tax calculator, CRA online payroll calculator, CRA payroll deductions calculator, and CPP deduction calculator. UK users can access HMRC tax refund calculator, HMRC SA302 computations, P800 tax calculation checks, HMRC company car tax calculator, and HMRC capital gains tax calculator. Irish, South African, and Zambian taxpayers benefit from our Irish income tax calculator, SA tax calculator, and ZRA PAYE calculator.

From simple use cases like add tax calculator, minus vat calculator, and vat calculation formula to advanced needs like section 179 calculator, macrs depreciation calculator, and real estate depreciation calculator, TaxPortal provides accurate, browser-based tools that respect your privacy. Whether you need a tax calculator 2021 22, tax calculator 2022 23, income tax calculator 2021 22, or income tax calculator 2022 23 excel-style reporting, our calculators deliver instant results without requiring personal data. Explore our full suite today and take control of your tax planning.

Frequently Asked Questions

How to calculate income tax on salary with example new regime?

To calculate income tax on salary under the new regime, start with your gross salary, apply the standard deduction if applicable, and then apply the applicable slab rates. For example, under the FY 2024-25 new tax regime, income up to ₹4 lakh is exempt, ₹4-8 lakh is taxed at 5%, ₹8-12 lakh at 10%, ₹12-16 lakh at 15%, ₹16-20 lakh at 20%, ₹20-24 lakh at 25%, and above ₹24 lakh at 30%. A standard deduction of ₹75,000 is available for salaried individuals. Use our income tax calculator for accurate results.

Old vs new tax regime calculator excel

You can compare the old and new tax regimes using our built-in calculator or by exporting income and deduction details into Excel. The old regime allows deductions under Section 80C, 80D, home loan interest, HRA, and LTA, while the new regime offers lower slab rates but limits most deductions. For most taxpayers, the new regime is beneficial if they do not have significant deductions. Use our income tax calculator AY 2026-27 new regime tool to compare both regimes side by side.

How to calculate tax in new regime on salary?

Calculating tax in the new regime on salary involves identifying your total taxable income after considering the standard deduction and then applying the new regime slab rates. The new regime does not allow most exemptions and deductions except the standard deduction for salaried individuals. Our tax calculator 2026 new regime simplifies this by automatically applying the correct slabs and cess.

How to calculate tax in new regime India?

In India, the new tax regime introduced under the Finance Act offers concessional slab rates in exchange for forgoing most exemptions and deductions. To calculate tax, determine your total income, subtract the standard deduction of ₹75,000 (for salaried), and apply the slab rates: 0% up to ₹4 lakh, 5% from ₹4-8 lakh, 10% from ₹8-12 lakh, 15% from ₹12-16 lakh, 20% from ₹16-20 lakh, 25% from ₹20-24 lakh, and 30% above ₹24 lakh. Add a 4% health and education cess on the tax computed.

Tax slab new regime

The new regime tax slabs for FY 2024-25 (AY 2025-26) are: 0% on the first ₹4 lakh, 5% on the next ₹4 lakh, 10% on the next ₹4 lakh, 15% on the next ₹4 lakh, 20% on the next ₹4 lakh, 25% on the next ₹4 lakh, and 30% on income above ₹24 lakh. A standard deduction of ₹75,000 is available for salaried individuals. These slabs apply to individuals and HUFs below 60 years of age. Senior citizens have higher basic exemption limits.

Income tax calculator AY 2026-27 new regime

For Assessment Year 2026-27, our income tax calculator applies the latest new regime slabs and standard deductions. You can input your salary, other income, and allowable deductions to get an accurate estimate of your tax liability, effective tax rate, and take-home pay. The calculator also supports the old regime so you can compare which regime saves you more tax for AY 2026-27.

Tax calculator 2026 new regime

Our tax calculator 2026 new regime is designed for the latest financial year and updated according to the Union Budget. It covers all the revised slab rates, standard deductions, and cess calculations. Whether you are a salaried employee, a freelancer, or a business owner, this calculator helps you estimate your tax liability under the new regime with minimal effort.

Income tax calculator AY 2026 27 excel old and new regime

You can use our online calculator or export the input data into Excel to perform a detailed comparison of the old and new regimes for AY 2026-27. The old regime allows various deductions such as 80C, 80D, home loan interest, and HRA, while the new regime offers lower rates but limited deductions. Our tool presents both calculations side by side so you can make an informed choice.

What is 234A 234B 234C interest calculator?

Sections 234A, 234B, and 234C of the Income Tax Act deal with interest for late filing of returns, interest for default in payment of advance tax, and interest for deferment of advance tax. Our 234A interest calculator, 234B interest calculator, and 234C interest calculator help you estimate liability under these sections quickly and accurately.

What is 80GG calculator and who can use it?

Section 80GG allows rent paid deductions for individuals who do not receive HRA. Our 80GG calculator helps you compute the maximum deduction available under this section, which is the least of rent paid minus 10% of gross total income, ₹5,000 per month, or 25% of gross total income.

How do I calculate TDS on salary for FY 2022-23?

Use our TDS calculator to compute TDS on salary for FY 2022-23 based on the latest income tax slabs and standard deductions. Enter your salary, other income, and applicable deductions to see the exact TDS deduction per month and the tax payable after adjusting for advance tax and TDS already deducted.

How to calculate capital gains on sale of property?

Our capital gains calculator with indexation helps you compute long-term and short-term capital gains on the sale of property. Enter the sale value, purchase cost, date of purchase, date of sale, and applicable costs to get your capital gain, indexation benefit, and tax liability under AY 2022-23 or the current year.

How to calculate GST interest and late fees?

Our GST interest calculator and GST late fee calculator help taxpayers estimate interest under Section 47 for late payment of GST and late fees under Section 50 for late filing of GSTR-3B. Simply enter the tax amount, due date, and payment date to calculate the exact liability.

How do I calculate tax on the sale of rental property?

Use our tax on sale of rental property calculator to estimate capital gains tax on the sale of property. Enter the sale price, purchase price, improvement costs, and selling expenses to compute your gain, apply applicable rates, and see your tax liability.

What is stamp duty on second home?

Stamp duty on a second home typically includes an additional surcharge on top of the standard rates. Our stamp duty calculator accounts for second-home surcharges and shows the total cost based on current stamp duty rates in your jurisdiction.

How do I calculate TDS on salary for FY 2022-23?

Use our TDS calculator to compute TDS on salary for FY 2022-23 based on the latest income tax slabs and standard deductions. Enter your salary, other income, and applicable deductions to see the exact TDS deduction per month and the tax payable after adjusting for advance tax and TDS already deducted.

How do I find my salary after tax?

Use our salary after tax calculator to find your exact take-home pay. Whether you want to know what 30k a year is how much a month after taxes or what 60k a year is how much biweekly after taxes, simply enter your annual salary, select your country and tax year, and get a detailed breakdown of taxes, deductions, and net pay.

What is 234A 234B 234C interest calculator?

Sections 234A, 234B, and 234C of the Income Tax Act deal with interest for late filing of returns, interest for default in payment of advance tax, and interest for deferment of advance tax. Our 234A interest calculator, 234B interest calculator, and 234C interest calculator help you estimate liability under these sections quickly and accurately.

What is 80GG calculator and who can use it?

Section 80GG allows rent paid deductions for individuals who do not receive HRA. Our 80GG calculator helps you compute the maximum deduction available under this section, which is the least of rent paid minus 10% of gross total income, ₹5,000 per month, or 25% of gross total income.

How do I calculate capital gains on sale of property?

Our capital gains calculator with indexation helps you compute long-term and short-term capital gains on the sale of property. Enter the sale value, purchase cost, date of purchase, date of sale, and applicable costs to get your capital gain, indexation benefit, and tax liability under AY 2022-23 or the current year.

How to calculate GST interest and late fees?

Our GST interest calculator and GST late fee calculator help taxpayers estimate interest under Section 47 for late payment of GST and late fees under Section 50 for late filing of GSTR-3B. Simply enter the tax amount, due date, and payment date to calculate the exact liability.

What is HRA calculator and how is HRA calculated?

Our HRA calculator computes the tax-exempt portion of House Rent Allowance based on the lowest of: actual HRA received, 50% of basic salary for metro cities or 40% for non-metro, or rent paid minus 10% of basic salary. Use our HRA calculation for income tax to maximize your HRA exemption and reduce tax liability.

How do I use the IRS W-4 calculator for 2022?

Our IRS W-4 calculator helps you determine the correct number of allowances or extra withholding to ensure the right amount of tax is withheld from your paycheck. Enter your income, deductions, and other income to get accurate withholding estimates for 2022.

How do I calculate my tax bracket?

Use our tax bracket calculator to see which federal and state tax brackets apply to your income. Enter your taxable income and filing status to get a detailed breakdown of marginal and effective tax rates, helping you understand how additional income is taxed.

How do I calculate capital gains tax on sale of property?

Our capital gains tax calculator on sale of property lets you enter the sale price, purchase price, improvement costs, and holding period to calculate long-term or short-term capital gains tax. Use indexation benefits if applicable to reduce your tax burden on property sales.

How do I calculate GST from total?

Use our GST calculator or GST reverse calculator to extract GST from a total amount. Enter the total inclusive amount and GST rate to calculate the GST amount and net amount. Our GST formula in Excel makes it easy to compute GST for bulk transactions.

What is my tax code and how does it affect my pay?

Our tax code calculator helps you understand your UK tax code and its impact on your take-home pay. Enter your tax code into our HMRC tax calculator or PAYE calculator to see how much tax and National Insurance is deducted from your salary.

How do I calculate monthly income tax?

Use our monthly income tax calculator to estimate your monthly tax liability based on your annual income, deductions, and tax credits. Whether you need a monthly tax calculator 2022 or a yearly tax calculator, our tools provide accurate estimates for budgeting purposes.

What is the effective tax rate formula?

The effective tax rate formula is total tax divided by total income. Our effective tax rate calculator computes this automatically, showing your average tax rate across all income sources and helping you compare your tax burden against marginal rates.
